verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Throw out the Life-Line Across the dark wave, There is a brother Whom someone should save; Somebody's brother! Oh, who then will dare To throw out the Life-Line, His peril to share?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Throw out the Life-Line! Throw out the Life-Line! Someone is drifting away! Throw out the Life-Line! Throw out the Life-Line! Someone is sinking today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Throw out the Life-Line With hand quick and strong; Why do you tarry, Why linger so long? See! he is sinking; Oh hasten today And out with the Life-Boat! Away, then, away!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Throw out the Life-Line To danger-fraught men, Sinking in anguish Where you've never been; Winds of temptation And billows of woe Will soon hurl them out Where the dark waters flow.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Soon will the season Of rescue be o'er, Soon will they drift To eternity's shore; Haste then, my brother, No time for delay, But throw out the Life-Line And save them today.
